qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: While opening a connection, the initial sequence number is to be derived using a time-of-day (ToD) clock that keeps running even when the host is down. The low order bits of the counter of the ToD clock is to be used for the initial sequence numbers. The clock counter increments once per millisecond
